name: My Wife’s Double Life
overview: Master thief Liu Rong assumes a false identity to marry straight-laced inspector Xu Muchen and infiltrate the Xu family in search of a priceless jade pendant. But as secrets unravel and suspicions rise, their calculated sham marriage turns into a high-stakes game of deception—and unexpected desire.

trailers.title: Trailer: Can cat and mouse be lovers? | My Wife's Double Life 柳叶摘星辰 | iQIYI
